rulings.Case Title: RICHARD KARL BACKER VS. PAUL OFFENBACHER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alt. Summ Adj
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on the Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, September 1, 2017, line 1. PLAINTIFF RICHARD BACKER MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. OFF CALENDAR, moot. Plaintiff's motion for Termination's sanctions granted on August 31, 2017. =(501/REQ)

Set for hearing on the Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, September 1, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANT ALBERTO OCON'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b). There are also triable issues of fact. See Defendant's response to Plaintiff's Additional facts. =(501/REQ)

Set for hearing on the Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, September 1, 2017, line 2. DEFENDANT ROGER OCON'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b). No issues to be adjudicated are listed in the Separate Statement. There are also triable issues of fact. See Defendant's response to Plaintiff's Additional facts. =(501/REQ)

Set for hearing on the Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, September 1, 2017, line 3. DEFENDANT ROGER OCON'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. DENIED. See Defendant's response to Plaintiff's Additional facts. =(501/REQ)

Set for hearing on the Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, September 1, 2017, line 3. DEFENDANT ALBERTO OCON'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b). There are also triable issues of fact. See Defendant's response to Plaintiff's Additional facts. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VALSTOCK VETURES LLC VS. XIAN SITU ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on the Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Friday, September 1, 2017, line 4. DEFENDANT XIAN SITU'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege which of the two distinct agreements referenced into the complaint (agreement entered on or before 7/1/17 for $431.12/month or lease entered into on 8/1/1993 for $300/month ) gives rise to the landlord-tenant relationship and forms the basis of this complaint. =(501/REQ)
